regime_fall.current_status: Iran-US escalation intensifies as ceasefire collapses: IRGC seized multiple commercial vessels and reimposed Strait of Hormuz blockade while US enforces comprehensive naval/economic blockade costing Iran $500M daily, three carrier strike groups positioned for combat, and Pakistan-mediated peace talks have collapsed with Iran rejecting US negotiation terms.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Pakistan-mediated US-Iran peace talks collapsed on April 23, 2026, as Iran rejected US terms including uranium transfer requirements; simultaneously, Pakistan-US ceasefire extension was announced on April 22 but Iran's IRGC seized MSC Francesca and Epimeonis in the Strait of Hormuz, fired on Euphoria, and Iran filed UN complaints alleging US strikes from regional ally bases.
